reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 재입고될때까지 기다렸다가 크림색으로 주문했어요 노랑보다 크림색이 이쁜것 같아요 사료를 급하게 금방먹는 편인데 급체방지 식기에 계량컵으로 일정양을 줬는데 확실히  천천히 먹는게 잘 샀다 싶네요  만족합니다
reviews.content_en: I waited for it to be back in stock and ordered the cream color. I think the cream color looks prettier than yellow. My pup tends to eat his food too quickly, so I decided to give him a measured amount using this slow feeder bowl, and it definitely makes him eat slower. I'm really satisfied with this purchase!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 요즘 자잘한 간식타임,영양타임에 '도시락 먹자~'하며 이 식기에 주고있답니다.방석이나 다른 바닥에 안놔주고 이곳에만 주니 깔끔하고 너무 만족.포켓밀도 잘 먹네요~
reviews.content_en: Lately during snack time and nutrition time, I tell her 'let's have a meal!' and use this bowl. I only put food here and not on a mat or other floors, so it's so clean and I'm very happy with it. She eats the pocket meal well too~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
임보하던 아이가 식분증이 생겨 혹시나하는 심정에 구매했습니다 :-)
결과는 대만족이구요 여러가지 변경요소가 있지만
일반그릇에 줬을때는 사료를 씹어먹지않고 삼켜먹는 형태로 먹었는데 확실히 급체방지 식기로주니 씹어먹고 식사시간이늘어난걸 볼수있었어요. 
다른 타 판매 상품도 있지만 실리콘이라는 점이 제일 맘에들었구요 가벼울것같지만 꽤 무겁고 묵직합니다 ㅎㅎ
무튼 매 끼니때마다 급체방지 식기에 식사주고있는데 식사시간 길어진것만 봐도 흐뭇합니다용..! 
이가 10개남짓한 아이러서 사료 삼키는게 더 심했는데 급체방지 식기에 주고나니 씹어먹더라구요 (뭘까요! 매직 ㅎㅎ)
너무 만족스럽습니당
reviews.content_en: The foster pup I was caring for developed pica, so I bought this just in case :−) And I'm very happy with the results. There are various factors at play, but when I used a regular bowl, she would swallow her food without chewing it. But definitely with the slow feeder bowl, I can see she's chewing her food and her meal time has gotten longer. There are other products available from different sellers, but what I liked most was that it's made of silicone. It seems light but it's actually quite heavy and substantial 😄 Anyway, I give her meals in the slow feeder bowl every time, and just seeing her meal time get longer makes me happy! Since she only has about 10 teeth left, she was swallowing her kibble even more, but once I started using the slow feeder bowl, she started chewing it (what's the secret! It's like magic 😄) I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
급하게 먹는 아이라 구매했어요! 
근데 하나 더 구매해야할둣.. 급하게먹는애가 하나 더 생겨서ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought this because my pup eats too quickly! But I think I need to buy another one... because I have another pup who eats too fast 😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 사료를 주면 바로 씹지도 않고 삼키는 우리 포메초록이의 습관을 잡아주기 위해 식기를 구매했습니다. 식기 구매전에 초록가 아파서 병원가서 엑스레이를 찍었는데 의사선생님께서 우리 초록이가 사료를 안씹고 그대로 음식이 속에 고여있다는 이야기 듣고 깜짝 놀랐습니다. 지금은 식기를 바로 구매해서 사용중인데 사료를 천천히 조금씩 잘먹고 먹는 시간도 좀 길어져서 매우 만족합니다. 추천하는 아이템입니다.
reviews.content_en: I bought this bowl to help break my Pomeranian Chorok's habit of swallowing food without chewing it. Before buying the bowl, Chorok got sick and we went to the vet for X-rays. The doctor told me that Chorok wasn't chewing her food and it was just sitting in her stomach, and I was shocked! Now I use the bowl right away, and she eats her kibble slowly, bit by bit, and her meal time is a bit longer, so I'm very satisfied. This is a highly recommended product.

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content:
밥을 안씹고 3초컷으로 먹는애라 항상 체할까봐 걱정이었는데 바잇이에서 실리콘 급체방지식기가 있길래 구매해봤어요.

우선 급체방지식기로 바꾼 후 15초 이상은 걸려서 대만족입니다! 

그리고 식기 안쪽이 비어있을줄 알았는데 실리콘으로 꽉차있어서 300그람이 좀 넘는 무게라 잘 밀리지 않는게 더 마음에들었습니다.
 실리콘이라 혀로 핥으며 먹어도 혀에 상처날일이 없는게 안심이되었구요.

단두종이라 좀 걱정했지만 이정도는 문제없이 호로록 먹어서 다행입니다 ^_^ 

크림색도 넘 예뻐서 만족스럽지만 예쁜컬러가 더 나오면 또 추가로 구매할것같아요!
reviews.content_en: My pup eats so fast without chewing—like a 3-second finish—so I was always worried she'd choke. I found BITE ME's silicone slow feeder bowl and decided to try it. First of all, after switching to the slow feeder bowl, it now takes over 15 seconds, so I'm very happy! I thought the inside of the bowl would be hollow, but it's completely filled with silicone and weighs over 300 grams, so it doesn't slide around easily, which I love even more. Since it's silicone, even if she licks it with her tongue, there's no risk of her tongue getting hurt, so I feel reassured. I was a bit worried since she's a brachycephalic breed, but she has no problem eating, thank goodness ^_^ The cream color is also really pretty and I'm satisfied, but if prettier colors come out, I think I'll buy more!

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지가 먹는걸 워~~낙 좋아해서 항상 급히 흡입하다보니 음식물이 기도로 들어가서 만성 기관지염이 생겼답니다… 아무 이유없이 수시로 컥컥대고 괴로워보여서 병원 진료와 함께 재발 방지를 위해 급체방지 식기를 사보았어요. 며칠간 사용한 지금은 밥먹다 사레들리는 일도 없고 염증도 많이 좋아졌는지 평소에 컥컥대지도 않는답니다. 아직도 꼭꼭 씹어먹는 다른 아이들에 비해선 먹는 속도가 좀 빠른지 모르겠지만^^; 저희애 기준으로는 많이 천천히 먹게 되었어요! 그냥 식기에 주면 한끼 거의 5초컷,, 급히 먹다보니 어쩔땐 먹자마자 토해버리는 경우도 있었는데 이 식기를 쓴 이후에는 한번도 그런일이 없네요! 한가지 건의사항이라면 높이 맞출수 있는 식탁?도 같이 세트로 귀엽게 만들어주시면 넘넘 좋을거같아요💚
reviews.content_en: My dog loved eating so much that she always inhaled her food super quickly, which caused food to go into her airway and she developed chronic bronchitis... She would randomly gag and look distressed for no apparent reason, so along with vet treatment, I bought a slow feeder bowl to prevent it from happening again. After using it for a few days, she no longer chokes while eating and the inflammation has gotten much better—she doesn't gag as much as before. Compared to other pups who chew food properly, maybe her eating speed is still a bit fast ^^; but compared to her usual pace, she's definitely eating much slower! With a regular bowl, one meal would be done in almost 5 seconds, and sometimes she'd throw up right after eating because she was eating so fast. But since using this bowl, that hasn't happened once! One suggestion would be if you could also make a matching feeding table with adjustable height as a set—that would be amazing 💚

reviews.name: T****
reviews.content:
애기가 며칠 아침에 일어나자마자 토를 하는 거예요
그 전날 저녁에 먹은 사료들이 소화도 하나도 안되어 있고요ㅠ
저녁을 너무 급하게 먹어서 고민이던 차에
이걸 딱 보고 여기다 급여하고 있는데요,
그 후로 단 한번도 아침에 토하지 않았어요😭
좋은 제품 만들어주셔서 너무 감사합니다...😭😭😭
reviews.content_en: My baby was throwing up every morning after waking up. The kibble she ate the night before wasn't digested at all 😭 I was worried because she was eating dinner too quickly, and when I saw this product, I decided to use it for feeding. After that, she hasn't thrown up even once in the morning 😭 Thank you so much for making such a great product... 😭😭😭

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 먹는 시간이 5배 이상 늘었어요 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Her eating time increased by more than 5 times. I love it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 넘 빨리 순삭해서 컥컥거리던 울 강쥐~~ 숨 쉬면서 식사중이셔요~~ 딸래미가 엄청 서치해서 찾은 제품인데 넘 잘 산거 같아요~^^
reviews.content_en: My pup used to eat so fast and gulp it down, but now she's breathing while eating 🐕 My daughter searched so hard to find this product, and I'm so glad we bought it~^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
일단 막내의 식습관이 좋아졌고, 사진에 노란색이라 촌스러울까봐 걱정했는데 실물이 훨씬 예뻐요!
그리고 실리콘 식기 쓰면서 이틀차부터 빨간 잇몸이 가라앉았는데.. 혹시 잇몸 마사지가 되나요? 그동안 계속 자이목스 잇몸약 바르면서 큰 변화 없었는데. . 신기했어요. 
흰색으로 똑같은 재질의 똑같은 제품 나오면 재구매 의사 있습니다. 지금 품절이던데. . 단종시키지 말고 계속 만들어주세요!!
reviews.content_en: First, my youngest's eating habits improved, and I was worried the yellow color in the photo would look tacky, but the actual product is so much prettier! Also, after using the silicone bowl, my pet's red gums calmed down by the second day... Could it be the gum massage effect? I kept applying gum medicine like Zymox for so long with no real changes, but this was amazing. If you release the same product in white with the same material, I'd definitely repurchase. It's out of stock right now... Please don't discontinue it and keep making it!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
최근에 급하게 먹는지 사료토를 자주 해서 슬로우식기 구매했어요
습식이랑 건식 둘다 줘봤는데 일반 식기보다 훨씬 오래 먹어요 
평소보다 천천히 먹어요
근데 냥이가 답답한지 앞발로 꺼내먹을려하네요 ㅠㅠㅋㅋ
토하는것보단 나으니 며칠 잘 지켜보려고 합니다
생각보다 그릇이 무거워서 밀리지도 않고 튼튼해보여요 
얼른 냥이가 적응해서 잘 먹었으면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: My cat has been eating too fast lately and regurgitating often, so I bought a slow feeder. I tried both wet and dry food, and it definitely eats much slower than with a regular bowl. But my kitty seems frustrated and keeps trying to scoop it out with her paws 😭😭 At least it's better than throwing up, so I'm going to watch carefully for a few more days. The bowl is heavier than expected so it doesn't slide around, and it looks really durable. I hope my kitty adapts soon and eats well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 급하게 먹어서 우엑 하는 우리 멈머 이 그릇으로 먹고 부턴 우엑 안해요 천천히 먹게되니 안심이에요 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: Our mom used to do that gagging thing from eating too fast, but since using this bowl, she doesn't gag anymore. I feel so relieved knowing she's eating slowly. Thank you!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 전에 일반 그릇은 자다가 불편해하더니 채를해서 사료를 토했더라구요.. 급하게 먹어서 그런듯 싶어서 이 그릇을 쓴 뒤로는 그런일이 없어서 안심하고 먹이고 있어요 만족스럽습니다
reviews.content_en: Before, when I used a regular bowl, my pet would be uncomfortable while sleeping and would regurgitate food. I think it was from eating too fast, but since using this bowl, that hasn't happened at all, so I feed with peace of mind. Very satisfied!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
모든 음식을 1분에 흡입해서 고민하다 구매 했어요~
색깔도 쨍하니 이쁘고 실리콘이라 무게감도 있어요~
오늘 처음 써봤는데 속도가 확실히 느려졌네요 ㅎ
굿입니다~
reviews.content_en: She was inhaling all her food in 1 minute, so I was worried and decided to buy this~ The color is so vibrant and pretty, and because it's silicone it has some weight to it~ I tried it for the first time today and the eating speed definitely slowed down 😊 Great!~

reviews.name: k****
reviews.content: 저희 집 10살 애기가 너무 빨리 먹어서 샀어요..! 디자인도 귀엽고 플라스틱보다 나을 것 같아서 구매했는데 먹는 속도도 확연히 줄어들어 좋아요! 다만 씻는게 조금 번거로울 뿐...
reviews.content_en: My 10-year-old at home eats way too fast, so I got this for her! The design is cute and it seemed better than plastic, so I bought it, and her eating speed definitely decreased a lot, which is great! The only downside is that washing it is a bit of a hassle...

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
디자인이 넘 이뿌다!!!!
실리콘이여서 바닥에 미끄러질 걱정도 없고 구름모양으로 인해서 급하게 먹는애들 급체 방지도 되서 너무너무 조아요!
reviews.content_en: The design is so pretty!!!! Since it's silicone, there's no worry about it sliding on the floor, and the cloud shape prevents choking in pets who eat too fast, so I absolutely love it!

reviews.name: a****
reviews.content:
꼼꼼한 포장과 빠른 배송 감사합니다 
아이가 처음엔 잘 안먹더니 코박고 먹느라 바쁘네요ㅎㅎ
급하게 먹어서 그런지 항상 토하느라 힘들었을텐데
이걸로 먹이고 난뒤엔 구토가 아직까진 없네요
잘 사용할께요
reviews.content_en: Thank you for the careful packaging and quick shipping! My pet didn't eat well at first, but now she's busy digging in with her nose 😄 Since she ate so fast, she would always be throwing up and struggling, but after feeding her with this, there's been no vomiting so far. I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 슬로우 식기 살려고 알아보고 있던 중 바잇미에서 슬로우 식기가 나왔다해서 망설임없이 구매했습니다. 사이즈도 디자인도 너무 마음에 들어요🥰 늘 호다다닥 마시듯 뚝딱 밥먹는게 속상했는데 속도는 확실히 세배정도 더 걸리는것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I was looking into slow feeders when I heard BITE ME came out with one, so I bought it without hesitation. I really love the size and design 🥰 It was always frustrating seeing her gobble down food so quickly, but now it seems to take about three times longer to eat.

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 며칠째 계속 구토를 하여서 걱정이 많았습니다. 아이가 큰 사료를 못먹어서 깨서 급여도 해보고 습식으로 물에 타서 급여도 해보았고, 나중에는 동결건조 사료를 습식으로 급여하는데 구토를 해서 고민이 많았습니다. 토하고 또 잘 먹어서 아픈건 아닌건 같고 고민하다가 급하게 먹어서 그런것같아 급체방지식기를 구매해보았습니다. 사기로 된 급체방지식기는 급하게 먹는 아이 중 치아가 부딪혀 깨질까바 걱정되는 분들이 있다는 후기를 보고 실리콘으로 구매 결정하였습니다. 생각보다 크기가 크고 오늘 아침 오자마자 급여해보았는데, 천천히 잘먹어요. 당연히 구토도 안했습니다. 진짜 잘 구매한것 같아요. 색상은 크림색 너무 예뻐요. 주저 마시고 구매하시길 바래요! 저희 아이는 참고로 포메 여아 3.6kg 아이 입니다.
reviews.content_en: My pet kept vomiting for several days and I was very worried. I tried crushing the kibble because she couldn't eat large pieces, and feeding with wet food mixed with water, and later even freeze-dried food mixed with wet food, but she still kept vomiting. She'd vomit and then eat well again, so it didn't seem like she was sick, but I suspected it was from eating too fast. I saw reviews about anti-gulping bowls with hard materials that some owners worried might damage their pet's teeth, so I decided to go with silicone instead. The size is bigger than I expected, and I fed her this morning right when it arrived, and she eats so slowly now. Of course, no vomiting either. I really think I made a great purchase. The cream color is so pretty too. I highly recommend buying this without hesitation! For reference, my pet is a 3.6kg female Pomeranian.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 오우!! 진짜 효과는 있습니다^-^ 순이가 하도 밥 주고 나면 뒤 돌아 잠깐 딴짓 하다보면 후루룩 다 먹고 쳐다보거든요ㅠ 그래서 자주 체하거나 토하고 설사도 하고ㅠ 그래서 구매해봤습니다!! 일단 밥 먹는 속도가 3배는 늘어났어요! 근데 잘 안씹고 삼키는건 비슷하지만ㅜㅠ 그래도 좀 천천히 먹을 수 있다는것에 참 감사하네요♥️ 그리고 다른곳에서 검색하보니 저가 제품도 있긴 있던데 이왕이면 값이 더 나가더라도 뭔가 안전할것같아서😊 크림색도 너무 예뻐요 노랑색 하려다가 순이도 좀 누렁누렁해서 크림색으로😆
reviews.content_en: Wow!! It really does work!^-^ Soon would eat so fast after I give her food, then turn away and do something else for a bit before gulping it all down and staring at me ㅠ That's why she often got indigestion, vomited, and had diarrhea ㅠ So I decided to buy this!! First of all, her eating speed has slowed down by like 3 times! But she still doesn't chew much and just swallows, but it's similar though ㅜㅠ Still, I'm really grateful that she can eat a bit slower now ♥️ And when I searched other places, there are cheaper products, but I figured it'd be safer to spend a bit more 😊 The cream color is also so pretty! I was going to get yellow, but since Soon is kinda yellowish too, I went with cream 😆

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
아이들이 빠르게 밥을 먹어서 기존에도 급체방지 식기를 사용하고 있었어요. 플라스틱 제품이라서 오랫동안 썼더니 깨지면서 바꾸게 되었어요.
한동안 검색만하며 마땅한 제품을 못찾았는데 바잇미 제품을 구입하게 되었어요. 크기가 클까 걱정했는데 후기를 보았더니 적당한듯 해서 샀는데 아이들이 평소보다 더 천천히 먹게되고 거부감 없이 잘 사용해줘서 맘에 들어요~
구름모양이라 세척하기가 조금 힘들지만 아이들이 잘쓰는걸로 대만족이에요~^^
reviews.content_en: My kids eat their food really quickly, so I was already using slow-feeder bowls. Since it was plastic, after using it for a long time it broke and I had to replace it. I searched for a while without finding a good product, but then I found BITE ME and decided to buy it. I was worried the size might be too big, but after reading reviews it seemed just right, so I got it and my kids eat much slower than usual and use it without any complaints, so I'm really happy with it~ The cloud shape is a bit hard to clean, but since my kids use it so well, I'm more than satisfied~^^

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 밥먹을때 급하게 먹어서 켁켁거려서 안절부절하면서 밥먹였는데 친한언니가 추천해줘서 구매해봤는데 넘 좋아요🥹밥먹는데 50초이상걸리고 켁켁거리지도 않아서 맘편히 먹이고 있어요🙂설거지하기도 편하고 들고다니기도 좋은거같아요👍
reviews.content_en: My pup was eating too quickly during mealtime and kept coughing and was so anxious, but a close friend recommended this product and I bought it and it's amazing🥹 She now takes over 50 seconds to eat and doesn't cough anymore so I can feed her with peace of mind🙂 It's also easy to wash and convenient to carry around👍

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 강아지가 항상 밥먹을 때 급하게 먹는 편이라 다른 노즈워크용 그릇에도 줘봤는데 잘 안먹더라구요 바잇미에도 급하게 먹는 아가들을 위한 그릇이 있길래 사봤어요 오늘 오자마자 씻어서 사료 덜어 줬더니 잘 먹어요ㅎㅎ 그릇이 딱딱한 플라스틱이 아니라 실리콘이라 씻기도 편하고 너무 좋네요 진작 살 걸 그랬어요^^
reviews.content_en: My dog always eats in a rush, so I tried other nose work bowls but he wouldn't eat from those. Then I saw that BITE ME also had a bowl for pups who eat quickly, so I got it. I washed it as soon as it arrived and put some kibble in it and he eats well from it ㅎㅎ The bowl is made of silicone, not hard plastic, so it's easy to wash and really great. I wish I'd bought it sooner^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 2개월  아기강아지 말티푸에요. 식욕이 많아서  평소에는 20초안에 불린사료를 다먹었어요. 바잇미 급체방지 식기사용 후에는 2분정도 걸려요. 처음에는 구름사이에 사료 못빼먹더니 2번째부터는 요령이 생겼는지 잘먹어요. 구름부분이 무게감이 있게 만들어져서 식기가 움직이지않아요. 실리콘이라 위생적이에요. 세척도 어렵지않아요. 잘산것같아요 :)
reviews.content_en: I have a 2-month-old Maltipoo puppy. He has a big appetite so normally he'd finish his soaked kibble in under 20 seconds. After using the BITE ME slow-feeder bowl, it takes about 2 minutes. At first he couldn't get the food out from between the clouds, but from the second time he figured out the trick and eats well. The cloud parts are weighted well so the bowl doesn't move around. Since it's silicone, it's hygienic. Cleaning is not difficult either. I think it was a good purchase :)

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
플라스틱으로 쓰던 상품 버리고 실리콘으로 구매 해보았어요
무게감 있고 탄탄해서 오래 쓸 것 같아요 디자인도 참 귀엽구요 ㅎㅎ
실리콘으로 바꾸나 훨씬 좋습니다! 아쉬운점은 조금 더 촘촘하게 디자인되면 급체방지에 좋을 것 같긴해요
reviews.content_en: I threw away the plastic product I was using and bought the silicone version. It has good weight and feels sturdy so it seems like it'll last a long time. The design is also really cute ㅎㅎ The silicone version is much better! The only downside is I think it would be better for preventing indigestion if the design were a bit more densely packed

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 다이어트중인데... 먹는 속도가 너무빠르고,  다 먹은후에 다른 강쥐밥을 다 뺏어 먹어요. 밥시간마다 감시해야 하는데 어제 요기다 주니까 처음엔 어리둥절 하더니 ...천천히  하나씩 잘 찾아서 먹네요.  그릇도 묵직해서  올려놔도 잘고정됩니다.
reviews.content_en: He's on a diet... but he eats so fast, and after finishing his own food, he steals all the other dog's food. I have to supervise every mealtime, but yesterday when I put it in this bowl, at first he seemed confused but... now he slowly finds and eats one piece at a time. The bowl is heavy too so it stays in place even when set down.

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 제품의 품질이 매우 좋고, 색상이 예쁘고, 무게가 있습니다.친구의 강아지와 자신의 강아지와 같은 색을 사주었는데 강아지가 밥을 먹는 재미가 더해져 너무 좋았어요!
reviews.content_en: The product quality is very good, the color is pretty, and it has nice weight. I got the same color for my friend's dog and my own dog, and the dogs really enjoyed the added fun of eating from it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
아뉘 진짜 갸우뚱 갸우뚱 하면서 잘도 찾아 먹어요!!! 근데 넘 갬동인건, 진짜 먹는 속도가 엄! 청! 느려졌어요. 평소에는 촵초ㅑㅂ촵촵 하면서 진짜 빨리 먹는데 이거 쓰고서는 오물오물 잘 씹어 먹어요!!
원래는 기존 식기랑 요 식기랑 먹는 속도 비교해 보려고 했는데, 옆에서 보는데도 월등히 차이가 많이 나서 일부러 기존 식기 써가면서 애기 급하게 먹게 하고 싶지가 않아서 비교 영상은 안찍었요. 기존 밥그릇은 이제 안쓸 예정........ 영양제 위에 살살 뿌려 얹어줬는데 혓바닥으로 낼름낼름 다 핥아 먹어요. 그리고 실리콘이라 뜨거운 물에 샤샤샥 헹구면 금방 깨끗해져서 위생도 걱정 없어요.
다만 영양제 주시는 분들 중 구매하실 분들은 꼭 확인! 필수!
❤️‍🔥 가루 영양제는 안쪽이 아니라 꼭 바깥쪽으로 뿌려주세요!  먹다보면 애기 침때문에 영양제가 말라붙는데 혓바닥으로 핥아 먹기에는 바깥쪽이 더 유리해요! 물론 저희 애기는 안쪽에 뿌려줬어도 잘 클리어 하긴 했지만....... 
애기가 다이어트 중이라 천천히 포만감 느끼는게 중요한데 진짜 진심으로 강추합니다.
reviews.content_en: He keeps tilting his head this way and that while finding and eating the food!!! But what's really touching is, the eating speed is like, really, really slow now! Normally he'd gobble gobble super fast, but after using this he eats carefully and chews well!! Originally I was going to compare eating speeds between the old bowl and this one, but seeing the huge difference from the side, I didn't want to deliberately feed him quickly with the old bowl anymore so I didn't record a comparison video. I'm not planning to use the old food bowl anymore........ I sprinkled some supplements on top and he licks them all up with his tongue. And since it's silicone, when I rinse it with hot water real quick it gets clean fast, so no worries about hygiene. But for those buying this who give supplements, please check carefully! It's essential! ❤️‍🔥 For powder supplements, sprinkle them on the outside, not the inside! As he eats, the supplements dry out from his saliva, and the outside is more advantageous for licking up with his tongue! Of course my pup cleared it even when I sprinkled it on the inside, but....... Since my pup is on a diet, taking time to eat and feel full slowly is important, and I really, truly recommend this.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
사료흡입하는 아이가 있어 구매했어요
쿠폰적용해서 잘샀어요
열탕소독되니 걱정없네요
무게감이 있어서 묵직해요
reviews.content_en: I bought this because my pup inhales his food. Got it at a good price with a coupon. I'm not worried since it can be sterilized with boiling water. It has good weight and feels substantial.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
완전만족합니다!
늘 허겁지겁 눈돌아가게 급하게 먹다보니 살이 나날이 쪄가는 기분이랄까,,,,(털쪄가는거라고 애써 말해봅니다,,,)
그래서 저희 애들에게 증말 필요했던 잇템 🤟 

기존 그릇에 먹었을때랑 급체방지식기에 먹었을때랑 비교를 해봤어요.
기존은 1분정도 끝내버렸고, 급체방지식기는 3분조금 안걸렸어요.(정확히는 2분35초!)
같은 양이라도 더 많아보이고 (?) 구름들 사이에 있는 사료들이 먹기 힘들다보니 찬찬히 먹게 되더라구요ㅎㅎ

그리고 건식사료뿐만 아니라 습식사료도 쌉가능👌
바잇미포켓밀로 진행해봤어요.
(눈돌아가는건 매한가지🥲)
평소에 먹는 것보다는 속도가 느려서 만족 매우만족입니당
오래먹는 기분이라 저희집 애도 만족이에용🙃
reviews.content_en:
Completely satisfied! 😄 My pups tend to wolf down their food so fast it's almost scary - let's just say their fluff keeps getting fluffier... 😅 So this was a must-have item for our crew! 🤟

I tested it compared to their regular bowl. With the regular bowl, they finished in about 1 minute, but with the slow feeder it took just under 3 minutes (exactly 2 minutes 35 seconds!). Even with the same amount of food, it looks like more (?), and since the kibble gets tucked between the clouds, they have to eat more slowly haha

And it's not just for dry food - wet food works great too! 👌 I tried it with BITE ME Pocket Meal. (The crazy eyes are still there though 🥲) The eating speed is slower than usual, so very satisfied! Our pup is happy too since it feels like a longer meal 🙂

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 밥을 너무 급하게 씹지않고먹어 늘사례가 걸려 높이가 문제인거같아 식기셋트도 바꿨는데도 사례가 고쳐지지않아 늘 고민이 많았는데 바잇미에 급체방지식기를 보고 유레카를 외치며 구입했습니다. 그런데 완전 성공성공 대성공입니다. 이제 아이가 사례걸리지않고 천천히씹어먹는 놀라움을 경험하고있습니다. 너무 감사합니다. 그런데 한가지 희망사항이 있다면 높이가 좀 높았으면 합니다. 그리고 물그릇도 급체방지가 되는것이 있었으면 합니다. 좋은제품 아이디어가 돋보이는제품 너무 감사합니다.
reviews.content_en: My pup was eating rice way too quickly without chewing and always had digestive issues. I thought it was a height problem so I even changed the bowl set, but the issue didn't improve. Then I saw the BITE ME slow feeder and shouted 'Eureka!' and bought it. And it's been a complete success! 🎉 Now my pup doesn't have digestive issues anymore and is actually chewing slowly - it's amazing. Thank you so much. One suggestion though - I wish the height was a bit taller. And I'd love to see a slow feeder option for the water bowl too. Thank you for such a great product with such great design ideas.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 살까말까 고민하다가 할인하길래 사봤어요 너무 좋아요 플라스틱 제품 쓰다가 실리콘 제질로 바꾸니까 엄청 편해요 식기가 묵직함이있어서 더 마음에 들었어요 역시 사길 잘한듯 해요 굿
reviews.content_en: I was debating whether to buy it but went for it since it was on sale. Love it! 😊 After switching from plastic to silicone, it's so much more convenient! The dish has a nice weight to it which I really like. Definitely made a good purchase! 👍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
1. 장점
 가. 급체방지라는 본래 목적 달성
 나. 실리콘이라 세척이 용이
 다. 실리콘이라 뜨거운 물 소독 가능
 라  적당한 무게감이 있어 밀리지 않음
2. 단점
 가. 크로와상같은게 붙어있는데 뭔가 꼴보기싫음(주관적)
 나. 디자인이 아쉬움(같은맥락)
 다. 무거움

선택의 폭이 좀 더 넓었다면 사지 않았을테지만 실리콘이라 관리가 편해 잘쓰고 있긴 합니다
reviews.content_en:
Pros:
a. Achieves its original purpose of preventing gulping
b. Silicone is easy to clean
c. Silicone can withstand hot water sterilization
d. Has good weight so it doesn't slide around

Cons:
a. There's this croissant-looking thing attached that looks kinda ugly (subjective)
b. The design is disappointing (same reasoning)
c. It's heavy

If there were more style options, I wouldn't have bought this one, but since it's silicone and easy to manage, I'm using it well.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 실리콘이라 물렁거릴 줄 알았는데 적당히 힘 있고 생각보다 꽤 컸어요. 그런데 그렇게 급체방지가 되나? 싶긴 하네요.. 글쎄요~~ 일단 다른 급체 방지 식기들에 비해 세척하기 쉬운 점은 만족합니다~~
reviews.content_en: I thought silicone would be flimsy but it has decent firmness and it's bigger than expected. Though I'm not sure if it really prevents gulping that well... 🤔 Anyway, I'm satisfied that it's easier to clean compared to other anti-gulping dishes!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 넘귀여워요ㅎㅎ 패키지도 남이뿌구요. 무거워서 깜놀이요. 뒷면은 파여있을줄 알았는데 평평하네요. 안까지 꽉차있는듯요. 그래서 댕댕이가 먹을때 흔들리지않고 안정적이에요:) 저렴이랑은 차원이 다르네요ㅎ 구름이 크로아상같아요ㅎㅎㅎ 엘로우도 사서 아침저녁사용해여겟어요. 소형견용이지 싶구요 크지않아 기존 식기테이블위에 올리기 좋아용:) 먹는데 3분걸리네요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute!! hehe The packaging is nice too. I was surprised by how heavy it is! I thought the back would be hollowed out but it's flat. It's completely filled inside, so when my pup eats, it doesn't wobble and stays stable :) It's on a completely different level from cheap products hehe The clouds look like croissants hehehe I'm going to buy yellow too and use it morning and night. I think it's for small dogs - it's not big so it fits nicely on the existing food table :) It takes 3 minutes to eat 😊

reviews.name: w****
reviews.content:
상품 사진 그대로 너무 예쁩니다.
무게가 진짜 묵직해서 더 마음에 드네요.
구름들이 설거지 할 때는 힘들긴 합니다ㅋㅋ
사진 속 사료 40g정도인데 꽉 차네요. 대형견들은 무리일 듯 합니다ㅠ 속도 부분에서는... 늦어지거나 하진 않았습니다.... 똑같이 먹더라고요. 더 복잡해야하나 봅니다. 그래도 둥글둥글한게 눈에 찔리지 않을 것 같아 안심됩니다.
속도는 늦추지 못했지만 제품이 너무 이뻐 계속 눈길이 갑니다ㅋㅋㅋ 개보다 내가 더 마음에 들어하는 듯~
reviews.content_en: The product looks exactly as beautiful as in the pictures. The weight is really substantial which I love. The clouds are a bit annoying to wash though lol The kibble shown is about 40g and it fills it up. Seems impossible for large dogs 😅 As for eating speed... it didn't slow down or anything... they ate at the same pace 😅 It probably needs to be more complicated. But the rounded clouds won't poke the eyes which is reassuring. It didn't slow down the eating speed but the product is so pretty I keep looking at it lol I think I like it more than my dog does~ hehe

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
급체방지그릇 다른거 쓰다가 바꿔주려고 주문했어요
크림색 깔끔하고 실리콘인데 생각보다 단단해서 튼튼해 보여요~ 받자마자 씻어서 과일 놓아줘 봤는데 불편함 없이 잘 먹네요
reviews.content_en: I was using a different anti-gulping bowl and ordered this to switch it out. The cream color is clean and it's silicone but sturdier than I expected, so it looks durable~ I washed it right away and tried putting fruit in it and it works well with no issues.

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
식성이 좋아서 밥을주면
잘 씹지도 않고 빨리 먹어요
한번 토한후 안되겠다 싶어서
슬로우 식기를 구입해 보았는데
확실히 먹는 속도가 늘어났고
조금은 씹기도 하네요
만족합니다
reviews.content_en: My pup has a great appetite so when I give him food, he doesn't chew and eats really fast. After he threw up once, I decided I had to do something and tried a slow feeder. It definitely slowed down his eating speed and now he chews a bit too. Very satisfied!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우리집 댕댕이가 먹귀가 들려서 엄청나게 뻘리먹어요 고민하다가  슬로우식기 검색중 바잇미 제품 보자마자 눈에서 하트가 뿅뿅♡2개중에 고민하다가 2개다 구입했어요 무게감도 있고 깊이도 적당해서 안전감있게 잘먹습니다 최고입니다🐶
reviews.content_en: My pup is a super fast eater and just gulps everything down. After thinking about it, I was searching for slow feeders when I saw the BITE ME product and my heart went pitter-patter ♡ I was torn between 2 options so I just bought both! It has good weight and appropriate depth so it feels safe and he eats well. It's the best! 🐶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이번에 라라때문에 사료를 너무금방먹고 1분미만에
소화도 안하고빨리먹어버리는 라라때문에 급체방지밥그릇을
주문했어요 
매번 소화했다 소화안되면 사료를먹은걸 토해버린게 
몇번이나있어서 큰결심을하고  밥그릇을바꿔서 줬습니다
급체방지 밥그릇으로 밥을주니 1분이나 3분이상정도 
천천히소화하면서 씹으니 너무 맘이놓입니다
reviews.content_en: Lala was eating her food way too fast, finishing it in less than a minute without properly digesting it, so I decided to order a slow-feeder bowl. She'd been vomiting up undigested food several times, so I made the big decision to switch bowls. Now that she's eating from the slow-feeder bowl, she takes 1-3+ minutes to eat slowly and chew properly, and I feel so much more at ease 😊

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 요즘 급하게 먹어서 구입했는데 조금 천천히 먹는데 도움 되네요~~
reviews.content_en: I bought this because my pup was eating too quickly lately, and it's helping her eat a bit slower~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
생각보다 단단하고 설거지도 편하네요:)
덕분에 우리 댕댕이가 천천히 먹는 효과를 톡톡히 봅니다~
그리고 생각보다 커요~^^
reviews.content_en: It's more sturdy than I expected and easy to wash too :) Thanks to it, our doggy is definitely eating slower~ And it's bigger than I thought~~^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
하트가 넘 급하게 먹어서 사용해본 
'바잇미 실리콘 급체방지식기'🥣

*식품등급실리콘으로 만들어 안전하게 먹고

*흐물거리지 않고 탄탄하여 쉽게 쏟아지지 않으면서 유연한 실리콘 소재로 더욱 편리하게  뽀독뽀독 세척🧼

*급체방지식기 사용 전에는 무엇이든 30초만에  
호로록먹던 아이가 구름모양을 피해서 천천히 먹어서 급체하거나 바로 배고파하지 않아서 매우 만족합니다👏👏
reviews.content_en:
Hart was eating way too fast, so I tried the 'BITE ME Silicone Slow-Feeder Bowl' 🥣

*Made with food-grade silicone so it's safe to eat from

*It doesn't get mushy and stays firm so it doesn't spill easily, plus the flexible silicone material makes it super convenient to wash thoroughly 🧼

*Before using the slow-feeder bowl, my pup would inhale anything in 30 seconds, but now she avoids the cloud shapes and eats slowly, so she doesn't get indigestion or get hungry right away - I'm very satisfied! 👏👏

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 강아지가 잘 씹지 않고 항상 급하게 먹어서 걱정이었는데 급체방지 되는 귀여운 그릇이 보여서 구매했어요! 실제로 먹는 속도 차이가 크네요😁 설거지할때도 수세미로 하니 잘 세척되고 좋네요 추천합니다
reviews.content_en: My dog doesn't chew well and always eats too quickly, so I was worried. Then I saw this cute anti-choking bowl and bought it! The actual difference in eating speed is noticeable 😁 It cleans well with a scrubber during washing too. I recommend it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노랑을시키고싶었는데,옵션선택을 잘못해서 크림이왔지만,그래도좋아요.저희강아지가 워낙 급하게 먹어서 걱정하던차에 급체방지라는 문구보고 주문했는데, 천천히 잘먹고,토도안해요.아주좋아요
reviews.content_en: I wanted yellow, but I made a mistake with the option and got cream instead, but I'm still happy with it. My dog was always eating too quickly which worried me, so I ordered it after seeing the anti-choking description, and now she eats slowly and doesn't throw up. It's great!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
더 촘촘하고 큰 타사제품을 먼저 샀다가 대실패하고
바잇미 제품은 평이 좋아서 구매해봤어요
아예 안 쓰지는 않는데 가운데 부분에 사료를 주면
좀 당황스러운가봐요 거의 못 먹고
가장자리에 몰아서 주면 조금 먹다 말아요..
잘 쓰고계신 집사님들 계신가요? 팁이 있을까요?
그래도 츄르를 구름부분에 줄 때는 잘 먹는 편이라
희망을 갖고 천천히 사용해보려고해요😅
reviews.content_en: I bought a thicker product from another brand first and it was a total failure. BITE ME products had good reviews so I tried them. She doesn't completely refuse to use it, but when I put food in the middle section, she seems confused and barely eats. When I put it around the edges, she eats a little then stops... Are there any owners using this well? Do you have any tips? Still, she eats well when I give her treats on the cloud part, so I'm going to keep using it slowly with hope 😅

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
1살 8.5키로 프렌치 불독이에요.
눈깜짝 할 사이에 사료 순삭 우리 강아지
급체방치 식기로 천천히 먹을 수 있을까 하고 주문해봤어요.
일단 생각보다 단단하고 구름빵(?)모양이 높아서 단두종 특성상 입이 짧은데 잘 먹을 수 있을까 걱정되더라구요,
화식 데워서 넣어줬는데 엄청 킁킁거리면서 열심히 핥아먹더라구요, 핥아먹다보니 온 사방으로 다 튀기고 먹고 킁킁대니까 더 채할 거 같은 모습이었어요,,😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂😂 일단 오늘 1일차 지켜보고 몇일 뒤에 다시 후기 덧붙일게요!
reviews.content_en: I have a 1 year old, 8.5kg French Bulldog. My pup literally inhales her food in a blink of an eye, so I ordered the slow-feeder bowl to see if she could eat more slowly. At first I was worried because it's more sturdy than expected and the cloud shape is quite high, and with her short muzzle as a short-faced breed, I wasn't sure if she could eat well. I warmed up her wet food and put it in, and she sniffed and licked at it so hard 😂😂😂 Food was flying everywhere and she was sniffing like she wanted more... Anyway, I'll observe for day 1 and come back with an update in a few days!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
밥을 너무 빨리 먹어서 구매했어요
다른 실리콘 제품 구매한게 있는데 그건 꽤 무거운데
이제품은 그렇지 않아요
모양도 이쁘고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because my dog was eating too quickly. I have another silicone product that's quite heavy, but this one isn't. The shape is cute and I like it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 먹보 우리집 강아지 구름이가 너무 급하게 먹어서 걱정이던 차에 식기를 받게되었어요!! 여전히 허겁지겁 먹긴하지만 전보다는 속도가 느려지고 조금 씹는 모습도 보여요!! 그리고 무게감도 있어서 밀리지 않아서 좋아요ㅎㅎ 같이 받은 습식사료?는 아직 먹여보지 못 했지만 캠핑댕댕이인 구름이랑 캠핑갈때 챙겨가서 먹여볼께요!
reviews.content_en: My foodie pup Gureum was eating so quickly that I was worried, so I got this bowl!! She still eats frantically, but her speed has slowed down compared to before and I can see her chewing a bit more!! Plus it has a good weight to it so it doesn't slide around, which is great ㅎㅎ I haven't tried the wet food I got with it yet, but since Gureum is a camping dog, I'll bring it on our next camping trip and try it then!
